examples.title: Pseudocode: Harris Corner Detection
examples.description: Detects corners in an image using the Harris corner detection algorithm
examples.code:
ALGORITHM HarrisCornerDetection
INPUT: Image I
OUTPUT: Corner points

BEGIN
 Compute gradient matrix M for each pixel in I
 Compute corner response R for each pixel using M
 Threshold R to obtain corner points
 Non-maximum suppression to refine corner points
END
examples.explanation: The Harris corner detection algorithm works by computing the gradient matrix M for each pixel in the image, then computing the corner response R using M. The corner response is then thresholded to obtain the corner points, and non-maximum suppression is applied to refine the corner points.

examples.title: Python: SIFT Feature Extraction
examples.description: Extracts SIFT features from an image using OpenCV
examples.code:
import cv2

# Load the image
img = cv2.imread('image.jpg')

# Convert the image to grayscale
gray = cv2.cvtColor(img, cv2.COLOR_BGR2GRAY)

# Create a SIFT detector
sift = cv2.SIFT_create()

# Detect keypoints and compute descriptors
kp, des = sift.detectAndCompute(gray, None)

# Print the number of keypoints detected
print(len(kp))
examples.explanation: This code loads an image, converts it to grayscale, creates a SIFT detector, detects keypoints and computes descriptors, and prints the number of keypoints detected.

examples.title: C: HOG Feature Extraction
examples.description: Extracts HOG features from an image
examples.explanation: This code defines a HOG descriptor structure and a function to compute the HOG descriptor for an image. The function initializes the HOG descriptor, computes the gradient histogram, and updates the histogram.
